title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses scaling challenges at Shopify, the cyclical nature of new database companies emerging, engineering principles for building reliable systems, and observations on AI coding agents and hiring elite engineers. The conversation covers infrastructure evolution in the 2010s, the importance of P99 performance, and turbopuffer's path toward Google-scale systems.
